source: WSET L3 Wines Specification – Issue 2.0.1, Section: Exam Regulations

rules.pass_requirement: Must pass BOTH units (Unit 1 AND Unit 2) to obtain the qualification
rules.minimum_pass_mark: 55% in EACH PART of Unit 1 (Part 1 MCQ AND Part 2 Short Answer) AND Unit 2

resit_policy.grade_cap_on_resit: Pass with merit maximum (cannot achieve Distinction on resit)
resit_policy.partial_resit: May resit only the failed unit if one unit was passed

exam_conduct: No communication between candidates once exam conditions are declared
Exam papers are WSET property and must not be removed

assessment_preparation_rules.recommended_study_material: Contains all information needed to answer questions correctly
assessment_preparation_rules.exam_language: Both units must be completed in same language
